name: query_channels
description: Get a list of channels that currently have active subscribers in your Pusher application. Optionally filter channels by name prefix (e.g., 'presence-' to get only presence channels) and request additional attributes like user count. Returns a dictionary of channel names with their attributes. Use this to monitor which channels are active and how many users are connected.

parameters.name: app_id
parameters.description: Your Pusher application ID. This is a path parameter in the URL.

parameters.name: filter_by_prefix
parameters.description: Filter channels by name prefix. Common prefixes: 'presence-' for presence channels, 'private-' for private channels. Only channels matching the prefix are returned.

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of additional attributes to return. 'user_count' returns the number of distinct users (only for presence channels). 'subscription_count' returns subscription count (must be enabled in dashboard).
